name: documentation-wizard
description: Audits documentation against verified code interfaces and generates evidence-backed drift reports.

interface.longDescription: Inventories documentation surfaces, extracts real interfaces from code and schemas, reports drift with user impact, and generates lightweight regression checks.
defaultPrompt: Audit this repo's docs against the live CLI and config surface.
Generate a docs drift report with exact source-of-truth references.
Create a lightweight regression check for doc drift in this project.
